TCDOL_DECISION.DOL_EMERGES: MR_open overall success beats A_decode_only and A_no_signal by the frozen margins with paired CIs excluding zero, MR_open clears chance on the SPLIT type while no_signal/decode_only sit at the split floor, A_mute falls to the cap, and A2 beats A5. The convention generalizes to context-dependent role assignment: the first brick of a division-of-labor society.
TCDOL_DECISION.CONVENTION_IS_DRIFT: MR_open beats decode_only/no_signal (context-conditioned division of labor exists) BUT A2 does not beat A5: the convention is drift/inheritance-fixed, not selection-maintained.
TCDOL_DECISION.DOL_CEILING: MR_open does not beat A_decode_only on the SPLIT type by the frozen margin: the convention does NOT generalize to context-dependence -> a richer ceiling at fixed conventions.
TCDOL_DECISION.UNDERPOWERED: fewer than TCDOL_N_SEEDS paired powered seeds, or a dropped/duplicated seed
TCDOL_DECISION.HARD_REJECT: oracle/redline failure, borrowed weights, or mean type recovery below TCDOL_TYPE_RECOVERY_MIN

frozen.TCDOL_DECISION_RULE: Role choice reads only: the agent's own decoded caller type, the comparison of its own stable self-signal vs the signal DECODED from the partner's channel message, and its heritable comparison-policy gene (or, in A_decode_only, a heritable type->role gene). The role DEMAND table and payoff truth are read only by resolve_dol at scoring time. The self-signal rides the grown channel (mute kills it), never a direct read of demand/role/payoff.

summary.decision_text: MR_open does not beat A_decode_only on the SPLIT type by the frozen margin: the convention does NOT generalize to context-dependence -> a richer ceiling at fixed conventions.

honest_note: TC-DOL tests whether the MR-BDC convention generalizes to type-conditioned role assignment. The gain over A_decode_only is concentrated on the SPLIT type; report per-type so the advance is not overstated. DOL_CEILING is a valid honest outcome (convention does not generalize to context).
